policy_in_effect.ladder: flat-gemini: rung0/1/2 = gemini-3.1-pro-preview / gemini-3.5-flash / gemini-3.1-pro-preview; rung3 = claude-opus-4-8

observed_summary.note: Flat-gemini sprint with escalation OFF. Every implementer/QA/reviewer ran rung 0 (gemini-3.1-pro-preview); technical-writer ran its pinned gemini-3.1-pro-preview. No escalation ladder was active, so no enforced trigger could change a rung. ZERO trigger-detected events were recorded for this sprint_id across all segments. All 19 recorded pre_spawn_estimates resolved model_requested=gemini-3.1-pro-preview.
observed_summary.killed_no_progress_explanation: The 4 killed_no_progress rows are auto-heal synthetic attempt-ends written by spawn-with-routing.sh when a prior orchestrator segment crashed mid-loop before its spawn-recover.sh ran; they are logging-loop closures, NOT real model failures. All real worker outcomes this segment were success.

token-explosion.rationale: No data — escalation off, never evaluated. Keep seed.

3-strike-review.rationale: Max observed review passes on any ticket = 1 (all single-pass APPROVE). Seed is conservative and correct.

no-progress.rationale: Longest worker run this sprint ~585s (<10m). Seed never approached.

test-thrash.rationale: No thrash observed; implementers ran the suite 1-3x. Keep seed.

out-of-scope-drift.rationale: Largest diff (#1133) touched ~17 files but all within ticket component (yaml-key rename ripple); not drift. Keep seed.

reviewer-pile-up.rationale: Max review passes per PR = 1. Keep seed.

repeated-security-flag.rationale: No security reviews spawned (no security-relevant tickets). Keep seed.

recommendations.default_rung: Keep rung 0 (gemini-3.1-pro-preview). Every ticket — including the wire-contract ticket #1127 and the docs sweep #1130 — succeeded single-pass at rung 0 with reviewer APPROVE and 0 blockers across the whole sprint. No evidence to raise default_rung.
recommendations.escalation: Remained OFF the entire sprint with no adverse outcome. No reason to enable for a similar flat refactor backlog.
recommendations.thresholds: Insufficient data to recalibrate any trigger (0 fired, escalation off). All proposals = keep seed. trigger-calibration remains seed-uncalibrated in spirit.
recommendations.pinned_model_artifact: MINOR PARSER BUG: spawn-with-routing.sh read_role_field awk fallback does not strip inline ' # comment' from pinned_model values; the technical-writer envelope model field emitted 'gemini-3.1-pro-preview  # FLAT-GEMINI ...'. Routing intent was correct (pinned gemini-3.1-pro-preview); the orchestrator passed the clean slug to delegate_task. Recommend stripping '#...' in read_role_field. Filed as a process note, not a routing failure.
